programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. programme.title: The Vampire Lestat
programme.desc: Lestat revisits his origins in Auvergne, explores Toledo with a recent reconnection, and deals with the fallout from Detroit, facing both band tensions and a disgruntled hotel owner.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Once a narcotics officer in the LAPD, Ray Owens settles into a peaceful life as sheriff of Sommerton Junction, a quiet border town. That peace is shattered when Gabriel Cortez, a vicious crime lord, escapes from FBI custody and speeds toward Ray's town with a band of mercenaries. Federal agents prepare to capture Cortez. programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The Stooges are running the local drugstore, mixing up a potion that a desperate businessman decides to sell as scotch.

programme.title: Nursing Home Nightmares 2026

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: After being persuaded by a wealthy businessman to conduct an aerial tour of Isla Sorna, InGen's second site for a failed Jurassic Park experiment, Dr. Alan Grant discovers the true reason for his invitation. A tragic accident maroons the party of seven, and they must attempt to escape with their lives.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: In Steven Spielberg's massive blockbuster, paleontologists Alan Grant (Sam Neill) and Ellie Sattler (Laura Dern) and mathematician Ian Malcolm (Jeff Goldblum) are among a select group chosen to tour an island theme park populated by dinosaurs created from prehistoric DNA. programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after "Jurassic Park," mathematician Ian Malcolm ventures onto a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: Goodfellas
programme.desc: Henry Hill, a poor Irish-Italian growing up in the 1950s New York City, rises through the ranks of his neighborhood's organized crime branch; he ends up in the FBI's witness protection program after testifying against his former partners.

programme.title: The Aging Brain

programme.desc: Exploring whether Michael Jackson created a gang truce; if Nickelback got the last laugh; and if Rosanna Arquette is the ultimate '80s muse.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Addressing whether Soul Asylum's "Runaway Train" really saved lives; the secret past of Rick James; Annie Lennox's spooky experience in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Explore who wrote rap's first hit; the legends of the "House of the Rising Sun"; how Cher battled the U.S. Navy.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Examining the fifth Beatle, Stonehenge being built for music, and Ashanti's marketing fiasco.

programme.desc: A countdown of favorite bands made up of siblings, with Rick Derringer, Bruce Kulick, Dee Snider, and others.

programme.title: The Top Ten Revealed
programme.desc: A countdown of the best 1980s break-up songs.

programme.title: The Top Ten Revealed
programme.desc: Ranking epic songs that peaked in 1969; these songs shaped a generation, created relationships and defined musical styles.

programme.title: The Top Ten Revealed
programme.desc: Ranking songs that flew up the chart but got stuck at number two and the songs that held them off.

programme.title: The Top Ten Revealed
programme.desc: Ranking the best soul songs of the 1960s.

programme.title: The Top Ten Revealed
programme.desc: It's smooth sailing when you hear these mellow jams; find out which yacht rock songs make our list as rock experts Don Felder, Sebastian Bach, Jeff Pilson and more count down top yacht rock songs.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Music critics discuss Roy Orbison's career.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: For years, mild-mannered Wall Street banker George Needleman (Eugene Levy) has meandered through life oblivious to his family's dysfunction and his company's malfeasance, but he's forced to wake up when he learns that he's been framed in a mob-backed Ponzi scheme. Placed under federal protection, George and his family are shipped down South to Madea's (Tyler Perry) house, where the no-nonsense mat

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Going the Distance
programme.desc: Erin (Drew Barrymore) and Garrett (Justin Long) are very much in love. When Erin moves to San Francisco to finish her journalism degree and Garrett stays behind in New York to work in the music industry, they gamely keep the romance alive with webcams and frequent-flyer miles. But just when it seems the lovers will soon be reunited, they each score a big break that could separate them for good.

programme.title: Adult Best Friends
programme.desc: Katie takes her best friend, Delaney, on a nostalgic trip to their childhood hometown to tell her she's getting married. Their journey soon takes some unexpected turns courtesy of a bizarre rental homeowner, a chance encounter with a former classmate, a bachelor party, and a few potential love interests.

programme.title: King's Ransom
programme.desc: When the rich and arrogant Malcolm King (Anthony Anderson) informs his wife, Renee (Kellita Smith), that he plans to divorce her, she becomes intent on taking as much of his money as possible in the settlement. Malcolm devises a way to keep his fortune, but it involves staging his own kidnapping. Unfortunately for Malcolm, numerous people, including the scheming Corey (Jay Mohr), are already plann

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After ratting out his Mafia cohorts, Giovanni Manzoni (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a French town. Despite the best efforts of their handler (Tommy Lee Jones) to keep them in line, Giovanni (now called Fred Blake), his wife (Michelle Pfeiffer) and children (Dianna Agron, John D'Leo) can't help but resort to doing things the "family" way. Howev

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: In the 1950s, notorious New York crime bosses Frank Costello and Vito Genovese vie for control of the city streets. Once the best of friends, petty jealousies and a series of betrayals place them on a deadly collision course that reshapes organized crime forever.

programme.title: Broken City
programme.desc: Former cop Billy Taggart (Mark Wahlberg) sees a chance at redemption for past sins when New York City's Mayor Nicolas Hostetler (Russell Crowe) calls on him for a special job. Hostetler thinks his wife, Cathleen (Catherine Zeta-Jones), is having an affair and that it may hurt his chances for re-election. However, a bigger scandal than expected pulls in Billy right at the start of his investigation

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: After moving to Paris, author Sidonie-Gabrielle Colette agrees to ghostwrite a semi-autobiographical novel for her husband. Its success soon inspires her to fight for creative ownership and overcome the societal constraints of the early 20th century.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: Thomas leads some escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Anyone who makes it out alive will get answers to the questions that the Gladers have been asking since they arrived in the maze.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: Though he used to race cars for a living, Brent Magna (Ethan Hawke) is now pitted against the clock in the most important race of his life; an unseen criminal (Jon Voight) has kidnapped Brent's wife, and to get her back, he must follow the man's instructions to the letter. Brent commandeers the ultimate muscle car -- a custom Ford Shelby GT500 Super Snake -- and, with a tech-savvy young passenger

programme.title: House of 1000 Corpses
programme.desc: An empty fuel tank and a flat tire lead two couples down a terror-riddled road to the House of 1000 Corpses. House of 1000 Corpses is at its core a story of family - a cast of twisted individuals who, with each slash of a throat or stab through the chest, add bodies to their sick human menagerie.

programme.title: The Devil's Rejects
programme.desc: After a raid on the rural home of the psychopathic Firefly family, two members of the clan, Otis (Bill Moseley) and Baby (Sheri Moon Zombie), manage to flee the scene. Heading to a remote desert motel, the killers reunite with Baby's father, Capt. Spaulding (Sid Haig), who is equally demented and intent on maintaining their murder spree. While the trio continues to torment and kill various victims

programme.title: 3 From Hell
programme.desc: Crazed killers Baby Firefly, Captain Spaulding and Otis Driftwood unleash bloody mayhem after escaping from prison.

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: After failing to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta wields the power of the mythic Black Trident to unleash an ancient and malevolent force. Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when the Flash uses his superpowers to travel back in time to change the events of the past. However, when his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, he becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation. With no other superheroes to turn to, the Flash looks to coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imp

programme.title: The Transporter Refueled
programme.desc: Frank Martin is living a less perilous lifestyle, or so he thinks, transporting classified packages for questionable people. Things get complicated when femme fatale Anna and her three accomplices orchestrate a bank heist and the kidnapping of Frank's father. It's all part of a grand plan to take down the human trafficker who victimized her years earlier. Now a pawn in her vengeful scheme, the for

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: Everyone in the Portokalos family worries about Toula (Nia Vardalos). Still unmarried at 30 years old, she works at Dancing Zorba's, the Greek restaurant owned by her parents, Gus (Michael Constantine) and Maria (Lainie Kazan). After taking a job at her aunt's travel agency, she falls in love with Ian Miller (John Corbett), a teacher who is tall, handsome and definitely not Greek. Toula isn't sure

programme.title: The Daytrippers
programme.desc: Eliza D'Amico's seemingly idyllic marriage to Louis changes dramatically when she discovers what she believes to be a love letter to him from someone else. Going home to her family for comfort, Eliza sets out with her mother, father, sister and her sister's boyfriend in the family car to track down and confront Louis. Always one step behind him, the family learns a lot about each other in the proc

programme.title: The Rock
programme.desc: FBI chemical warfare expert Stanley Goodspeed (Nicolas Cage) is sent on an urgent mission with a former British spy, John Patrick Mason (Sean Connery), to stop Gen. Francis X. Hummel (Ed Harris) from launching chemical weapons on Alcatraz Island into San Francisco. Gen. Hummel demands $100 million in war reparations to be paid to the families of slain servicemen who died on covert operations. Afte

programme.title: Contagion
programme.desc: When Beth Emhoff returns to Minnesota from a Hong Kong business trip, she attributes the malaise she feels to jet lag. However, two days later, Beth is dead, and doctors tell her shocked husband that they have no idea what killed her. Soon, many others start to exhibit the same symptoms, and a global pandemic explodes. Doctors try to contain the lethal microbe, but society begins to collapse as a

programme.title: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: The last of five coveted "golden tickets" falls into the hands of a sweet but very poor boy. He and his grandpa then get a tour of the strangest chocolate factory in the world. The owner leads five young winners on a thrilling and often dangerous tour of his factory.

programme.title: Night on Earth
programme.desc: This film presents five stories, each involving a cab ride and set in a different city around the world. In Los Angeles, no-nonsense taxi driver Corky (Winona Ryder) gets an engaging customer in the form of a Hollywood casting agent (Gena Rowlands), while a Parisian cabbie (Isaach De Bankolé) must contend with some rowdy African diplomats. Among the other tales, a standout is the Italian taxi ride

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After the death of Richard the Lion-Hearted, a skilled archer named Robin Longstride travels to Nottingham, where villagers suffer under a despotic sheriff and crippling taxation. He meets and falls in love with a spirited widow, Marion, although she is skeptical of his motives. Hoping to win her heart and save the village, Robin gathers a band of warriors to fight corruption in Nottingham, little

programme.title: Twin Peaks: Fire Walk With Me
programme.desc: In the folksy town of Deerfield, Wash., FBI Agent Desmond (Chris Isaak) inexplicably disappears while hunting for the man who murdered a teen girl. The killer is never apprehended, and, after experiencing dark visions and supernatural encounters, Agent Dale Cooper (Kyle MacLachlan) chillingly predicts that the culprit will claim another life. Meanwhile, in the similarly cozy town of Twin Peaks, he

programme.title: Green Lantern: Emerald Knights
programme.desc: New recruit Arisia (Elisabeth Moss) joins forces with Hal Jordan (Nathan Fillion) to save the universe from the forces of Krona.

programme.title: Green Lantern: First Flight
programme.desc: The Green Lantern must race against time to stop Sinestro from unleashing a sinister plot.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: Sworn to preserve intergalactic order, the Green Lantern Corps has existed for centuries. Its newest recruit, Hal Jordan, is the first human to join the ranks. The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have thus far been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a gifted and cocky test pilot, may be the corps' only hope when a new enemy called Parallax thr

programme.title: Pirate Radio
programme.desc: In 1966, BBC radio broadcasts less than an hour of pop music a day, forcing pirate DJs to take up the slack from boats anchored outside British waters. Quentin (Bill Nighy) is the commander of such a pirate station, overseeing a host of seedy, lusty and dope-smoking DJs, including the Count (Philip Seymour Hoffman) and Dave (Nick Frost), who makes it his personal mission to see to it that Quentin'

programme.title: Ghost Dog: The Way of the Samurai
programme.desc: Ghost Dog (Forest Whitaker) is a contract killer, a master of his trade who can whirl a gun at warp speed and moves through this world like a phantom -- stealthy and evanescent. In the spirit of the samurai, he has pledged his loyalty to a small time mobster named Louie (John Tormey) who saved his life many years before.

programme.title: Going the Distance
programme.desc: Erin (Drew Barrymore) and Garrett (Justin Long) are very much in love. When Erin moves to San Francisco to finish her journalism degree and Garrett stays behind in New York to work in the music industry, they gamely keep the romance alive with webcams and frequent-flyer miles. But just when it seems the lovers will soon be reunited, they each score a big break that could separate them for good.

programme.title: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Four couples, all friends, descend on a tropical island resort. Though one husband and wife are there to work on their marriage, the others just want to enjoy some fun in the sun. They soon find out that the paradise comes at a price, participation in couples therapy sessions is mandatory. What started out as a cut-rate vacation turns into an examination of the common problems many face.

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: In a series of interconnected stories, various Los Angeles residents (Jessica Alba, Jessica Biel, Bradley Cooper) wend their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day. As the holiday unfolds, they experience first dates, longtime commitments, youthful crushes and connections to old flames.

programme.title: The Player
programme.desc: Certain that the anonymous threats he's been receiving are the work of David Kahane (Vincent D'Onofrio), producer Griffin Mill (Tim Robbins) tries to fix things over cocktails. Instead, Griffin ends up murdering the screenwriter and courting the dead man's girlfriend (Greta Scacchi). As police investigate, Griffin concentrates on a prestigious film that might reinvigorate his career. But he soon l

programme.title: Lord of the Flies
programme.desc: Amidst a nuclear war, a plane carrying a group of schoolboys crash lands on a deserted island. With no adult survivors, the boys are forced to fend for themselves. At first, they cooperate, but when they split into two separate camps -- one led by the pragmatic Ralph (James Aubrey) and the other by militaristic Jack (Tom Chapin) -- their society falls into disarray, leading to a disturbing examina

programme.title: Final Destination 3
programme.desc: Six years after a group of high-school students first cheated death, another teen (Mary Elizabeth Winstead) has a premonition that she and her friends will be involved in a horrifying roller-coaster accident. When the vision proves true, the student and her fellow survivors must deal with the repercussions of cheating the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: The Gift
programme.desc: A new short film by Gary T. Smith, "The Gift," tells the story of a college senior who has her world rocked when she finds a homeless girl sleeping in her car on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Terminator
programme.desc: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against the

programme.title: The Asphalt Jungle
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, Dix Handley concocts a plan to steal $1 million in jewels. Dix gathers a team of small-time crooks, including a safecracker and a lawyer, and the heist is a success until a stray bullet kills one of the men. As they scramble to pick up the pieces after the theft, the men let their greed get the best of them while entangling themselves in webs of deceit, treachery and

programme.title: Sing Sing
programme.desc: A man is imprisoned at Sing Sing for a crime he didn't commit. When joined by a wary outsider, he finds purpose in staging an original comedy with a theater group of other incarcerated men.

programme.title: Room
programme.desc: Held captive for years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

programme.title: Won't Back Down
programme.desc: Jamie Fitzpatrick and Nona Alberts are two women from opposite sides of the social and economic track, but they have one thing in common: a mission to fix their community's broken school and ensure a bright future for their children. The two women refuse to let any obstacles stand in their way as they battle a bureaucracy that's hopelessly mired in traditional thinking, and they seek to re-energiz

programme.title: The Sessions
programme.desc: Though a childhood bout with polio left him dependent on an iron lung, Mark O'Brien (John Hawkes) maintains a career as a journalist and poet. A writing assignment dealing with sex and the disabled piques Mark's curiosity, and he decides to investigate the possibility of experiencing sex himself. When his overtures toward a caregiver (Annika Marks) scare her away, he books an appointment with sex

programme.title: Heretic
programme.desc: A diabolical Mr. Reed ensnares two young missionaries in a terrifying game of cat and mouse when they knock on the wrong door and are forced to prove their faith.

programme.title: Godzilla, King of the Monsters!
programme.desc: A U.S. newsman (Raymond Burr) in Tokyo recounts the story of a huge dinosaur roused from the sea by an atomic blast.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla
programme.desc: An Okinawan monster-god helps Godzilla defeat his bionic double.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. King Ghidorah
programme.desc: Time-travelers' efforts to prevent a dinosaur's mutation result in the creation of a three-headed dragon that terrorizes Japan.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their

programme.title: Lady Bird
programme.desc: A teenager (Saoirse Ronan) navigates a loving but turbulent relationship with her strong-willed mother (Laurie Metcalf) over the course of an eventful and poignant senior year of high school.

programme.title: Love, Simon
programme.desc: Everyone deserves a great love story, but for 17-year-old Simon Spier, it's a little more complicated. He hasn't told his family or friends that he's gay, and he doesn't know the identity of the anonymous classmate that he's fallen for online. Resolving both issues proves hilarious, terrifying and life-changing.

programme.title: Walk the Line
programme.desc: The rise of country music legend Johnny Cash (Joaquin Phoenix) begins with his days as a boy growing up on the family farm, where he struggles under the scorn of his father (Robert Patrick). As the years pass, Cash ends up in Memphis, Tenn., with his wife, Vivian (Ginnifer Goodwin), and breaks into the music scene after finding his trademark sound. While on tour, Cash meets the love of his life, s

programme.title: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: The true and untold story of prolific rapper, actor, poet and activist Tupac Shakur (Demetrius Shipp Jr.), from his early days in New York to his status as one of the world's most recognized and influential voices. Against all odds, Shakur's raw talent, powerful lyrics and revolutionary mindset establish him as a cultural icon whose legacy continues to grow long after his death.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants

programme.title: Red Sparrow
programme.desc: Prima ballerina Dominika Egorova faces a bleak and uncertain future after she suffers an injury that ends her career. She soon turns to Sparrow School, a secret intelligence service that trains exceptional young people to use their minds and bodies as weapons. Egorova emerges as the most dangerous Sparrow after completing the sadistic training process. As she comes to terms with her new abilities,

programme.title: Everything, Everything
programme.desc: Maddy (Amandla Stenberg) is a smart, curious and imaginative 18-year-old who is unable to leave the protection of the hermetically-sealed environment within her house because of an illness. Olly (Nick Robinson) is the boy next door who won't let that stop them from being together. Gazing through windows and talking only through texts, Maddy and Olly form a deep bond that leads them to risk everyth

programme.title: Gifted
programme.desc: Frank Adler (Chris Evans) is a single man raising a child prodigy - his spirited young niece Mary (Mckenna Grace) - in a coastal town in Florida. Frank's plans for a normal school life for Mary are foiled when the 7-year-old's mathematical abilities come to the attention of Frank's formidable mother, Evelyn (Lindsay Duncan), whose plans for her granddaughter threaten to separate Frank and Mary.

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her n

programme.title: The Watchers
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she unknowingly becomes trapped alongside three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: Shut In
programme.desc: Mary Portman is a widowed child psychologist who lives in isolation in rural Maine. The horrific car accident that killed her husband also left her 18-year-old stepson Stephen in a bedridden, catatonic state, leaving him completely dependent on her. programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: With wit and athletic genius, with defiant rage and inner grace, Muhammad Ali forever changed the American landscape. programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: Two young lovers from different backgrounds meet and fall in love on the ill-fated maiden voyage of the unsinkable R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: Primal Fear
programme.desc: Defense attorney Martin Vail takes on jobs for money and prestige rather than any sense of the greater good. His latest case involves an altar boy, accused of brutally murdering the archbishop of Chicago. programme.title: Southpaw

programme.title: Paid in Full
programme.desc: In the late 1980s, Ace (Wood Harris) is a young man employed by a Harlem dry cleaning shop, working hard to stay out of the drug business. While making deliveries, he meets Lulu (Esai Morales), a drug dealer who convinces Ace to join him. programme.title: Staten Island Summer
programme.desc: Danny and Frank work as lifeguards for the summer and make plans to throw the wildest party of the season.

programme.title: The Dictator
programme.desc: Gen. Aladeen (Sacha Baron Cohen) has ruled the oil-rich North African country of Wadiya since the age of six, when 97 stray bullets and a hand grenade killed his father in a hunting accident. After an assassination attempt takes the life of yet another body-double, Tamir (Ben Kingsley), Aladeen's uncle and most trusted adviser, convinces Aladeen to go to New York. Unfortunately, Aladeen has a less

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet
programme.desc: Hoping to stay in the country, a gay man proposes a green card marriage to a female friend in exchange for paying for her IVF treatment. However, things soon get complicated when his grandmother surprises them with plans for an extravagant Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: Monstrous
programme.desc: A terrifying new horror awaits Laura and her 7-year-old son, Cody, when then they flee her abusive ex-husband and try to settle into a new life in an idyllic and remote lakeside farmhouse. Still traumatized, their physical and mental well-being are pushed to the limit as their fragile existence is threatened.

programme.title: Slingshot
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain (Idris Elba), the last Gunslinger, is locked in an eternal battle with Walter O'Dim (Matthew McConaughey), also known as the Man in Black. The Gunslinger must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together. With the fate of worlds at stake, two men collide in the ultimate battle between good and evil.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II
programme.desc: The compelling sequel to "The Godfather," contrasting the life of Corleone father and son. Traces the problems of Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) in 1958 and that of a young immigrant Vito Corleone (Robert De Niro) in 1917's Hell's Kitchen. Michael survives many misfortunes and Vito is introduced to a life of crime.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: In February and March 1945, U.S. troops fight and win one of the most crucial and costly battles of the war on the island of Iwo Jima. A photo of U.S. servicemen raising the flag on Mount Suribachi becomes an iconic symbol of victory to a war-weary nation. The individuals themselves become heroes, though not all survive the war and realize it.

programme.title: Snag
programme.desc: A lone wolf's quiet existence gets shattered when he learns that the woman he once loved and thought was dead is alive and being held captive by ruthless gangsters. Now, to take on this dangerous criminal organization, he must seek out allies and storm into a world of violence to rescue the love of his life.

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: A young man (Matthew McConaughey) continues to live at the home of parents who, in desperation to push him out of the nest once and for all, hatch a plan. They hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to assume the mantle of responsibility and get his own place.

programme.title: Queen Bees
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls.".

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: The Running Man

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as Capt. Timothy Close and his Coast Guard crew launch a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Seaside
programme.desc: A woman decides to run away to the Oregon coast with her boyfriend when he inherits a family beach house.

programme.title: Aurora: A Love Story

programme.title: Buddy Games
programme.desc: After a falling out, six lifelong friends reunite to play the buddy games -- an insane competition filled with absurd physical and mental challenges. Now, all bets are off, as the determined pals fight, claw and party for the chance to win $150,000.

programme.title: Buddy Games: Spring Awakening
programme.desc: Faced with their biggest challenge yet, the gang sets out to honor a lost pal, only to find themselves in the middle of where it all began -- spring break. They soon learn their old school ways of partying can hardly compete with today's generation.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths

programme.title: Molly's Game

programme.title: Ride
programme.desc: Desperate to raise money for his daughter's cancer treatment, a retired bull rider teams up with his estranged son to orchestrate a robbery. However, they must soon outwit the local police if they want to keep the cash and their freedom.

programme.title: The Infernal Machine

What ensues is a dangerous labyrinth as Bruce searches for the person behind the cryptic messages, forcing him to confront his past and ultimately revealing the truth behind the book.

programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie and Venom, now on the run, face dangers from both worlds as the end of their symbiotic relationship grows near. Tom Hardy stars.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as legendary warrior Achilles, leading the armies of ancient Greece into battle against Troy. Sword-and-sandal epic with Eric Bana. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Cute furball Gizmo is reunited with his human friends Billy and Kate, who now work in the New York offices of an eccentric tycoon. However, it is not long before Gizmo has spawned a new generation of murderous carnivores, who quickly overrun the building - and a genetics lab where they produce even more startling mutations. Joe Dante's comedy sequel, starring Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, John Glov

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, The Cinema List explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: Adult Life Skills
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town to live in a shed belonging to her mother, who grows frustrated as her daughter regresses to childhood. A friendship develops between the directionless woman and a troubled young boy, which gives her the push she needs to develop a more independent outlook on life. Comedy, starring Jodie Whittaker and Lorraine Ashbourne.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partner's show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklater's biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A host of weird and wacky characters cause mayhem at an exclusive golf club, including a laid-back professional player, an obnoxious millionaire, the snobbish club president, a motley collection of teenage caddies and a psychotic groundskeeper engaging in a fight to the death with a canny gopher. Comedy, starring Chevy Chase, Bill Murray, Michael O'Keefe and Rodney Dangerfield.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: America's most inept cops graduate and are let loose on the streets - under the command of an unscrupulous lieutenant whose promotion depends on their failure. Fortunately for him, their unique brand of policing actually leads to an increase in the crime rate. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, David Graf and Michael Winslow.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: A failed rock star carves out a career as a popular wedding singer, but his hopes for a bright future are dashed when his fiancee jilts him at the altar and he tries to shut himself off from the outside world. At one of his functions, a waitress catches his eye - but unfortunately for him, she is already engaged to someone else. Romantic comedy set in the 1980s, starring Adam Sandler and Drew Barr

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wife's stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids' birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four teenage lads make a solemn pact to lose their virginity before the high-school prom. Though their antics cause them huge embarrassment and public humiliation, the friends also learn about love and affection in their relations with the opposite sex. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Jason Biggs, Shannon Elizabeth, Chris Klein, Alyson Hannigan, Mena Suvari, Seann William Scott and Eugene Levy.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: The teenagers reunite after their first year at college to spend the summer at a lake house. Jim is concerned by his lack of sexual experience, and goes in search of an old flame, Oz struggles to keep a long-term relationship going, and Finch tries to master the art of tantric sex. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Biggs, Chris Klein, Seann William Scott, Alyson Hannigan and Eugene Levy.

programme.title: You've Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rivals in the bookshop business fall in love over the internet, unaware they know and dislike each other in the real world. While things remain frosty in person, the pair's anonymous online relationship continues to blossom. Romantic comedy, starring Tom Hanks, Meg Ryan, Greg Kinnear, Parker Posey and Dabney Coleman.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey.

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: When two young men cross paths in Berlin, a simple afternoon in the big city soon takes on a much greater meaning. Heartfelt drama.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: Elizabeth Banks stars as a talented surgeon whose life unravels after an inexperienced colleague makes a fatal mistake. Tense medical drama.

programme.title: Burning An Illusion
programme.desc: A young British-born Black woman experiences an awakening as she navigates a relationship in Thatcher's London and begins to question everything about love and life.

programme.title: Terms Of Endearment
programme.desc: Oscar-winning tearjerker about the fraught relationship between eccentric Shirley MacLaine and headstrong daughter Debra Winger. With Jack Nicholson. Strong language/sex.

programme.title: Boyz N The Hood
programme.desc: Ice Cube and Cuba Gooding Jr star as friends fighting to survive on the mean streets of inner city LA. Hard-hitting, Oscar-nominated drama.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: Elizabeth Banks stars as a talented surgeon whose life unravels after an inexperienced colleague makes a fatal mistake. Tense medical drama.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: A complex love story unfolds when a musician battling his inner demons helps a struggling singer find fame. With Bradley Cooper and Lady Gaga.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: In 1920s Chicago, slick lawyer Richard Gere does his best to get showbiz jailbirds Catherine Zeta-Jones and Renee Zellweger off the hook. Dazzling winner of six Oscars.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: On learning he can time travel, Domhnall Gleeson tries to engineer the perfect relationship with Rachel McAdams. Romance from Richard Curtis. Strong language/sex/nudity.

programme.title: Boyz N The Hood
programme.desc: Ice Cube and Cuba Gooding Jr star as friends fighting to survive on the mean streets of inner city LA. Hard-hitting, Oscar-nominated drama.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train.

programme.title: Mousehunt
programme.desc: Lee Evans and Nathan Lane are the bumbling brothers whose plans to renovate a valuable building are thwarted by a super smart rodent. Comedy with Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Zoo
programme.desc: Family drama following a group of misfit friends as they attempt to save a baby elephant during the German air raids on Belfast in 1941. With Toby Jones. Flashing images.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Family adventure about a gas-guzzling monster that takes up residence in the truck of downtrodden high-schooler Lucas Till.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: Shrunk by the ants he tormented, Lucas must learn to work with the insects, instead of against them. Bugs bite back in this animation from the director of Jimmy Neutron.

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds voices the famous Pokémon hero as he puts his sleuthing skills to work to help a 21-year-old find his missing detective father.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, embarking on a thrilling and mysterious adventure.

programme.title: Cats & Dogs
programme.desc: Fur flies as the kung fu cats of power-hungry Mr Tinkles battle for world domination against a pack of canine commandos. Animal antics. Mild violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The little blue critters find themselves hiding out in New York when evil wizard Gargamel chases them out of their village. Family fun. Flashing images.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: Li Fong relocates to New York City and attracts unwanted attention from a local karate champion. He embarks on a journey to enter the ultimate karate competition.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is mistaken for a secret agent when a hi-tech tux turns him into a superspy. Jennifer Love Hewitt stars in a gadget-packed action comedy.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A wayward orphan befriends a captive killer whale, but when danger comes calling he vows to release his new pal safely into the wild. Family drama with Michael Madsen.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: With cultural traditions driving a wedge between them, newly weds Alex and Isabel must find compromise to make the marriage last. Starring the late Matthew Perry.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Rob Reiner's mockumentary masterpiece chronicles the misadventures of a British rock band struggling to recover their former glory. With Christopher Guest and Harry Shearer.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Goldie Hawn, Diane Keaton and Bette Midler take revenge on the husbands who dumped them for trophy wives. Girl power comedy with Maggie Smith and Sarah Jessica Parker.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: With cultural traditions driving a wedge between them, newly weds Alex and Isabel must find compromise to make the marriage last. Starring the late Matthew Perry.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: While Matthew Broderick skips school and has the day off to die for, Principal Ed Rooney tries to catch him out. Classic 80s comedy from John Hughes. Strong language.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as the animal-loving private eye on the trail of a kidnapped dolphin. Riotous comedy with Courteney Cox and Sean Young. Discriminatory content.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Pet detective Jim Carrey pursues a kidnapped bat through the African jungle. Madcap comedy sequel of rhinos and witch doctors, from the writer of Bruce Almighty.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: Classic musical about a scrappy young orphan whose life changes overnight when she is taken in by a billionaire. Starring Carol Burnett and the late Albert Finney.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Tough cop Arnold Schwarzenegger takes on the most difficult job of his life when he goes undercover as a nursery teacher. Violence/stereo sound only.

programme.title: Naked Gun: From The Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Leslie Nielsen stars as incompetent cop Frank Drebin, who is out to stop a plot to assassinate the Queen. Top slapstick comedy. Flashing images.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell Of Fear
programme.desc: Slapstick fun as detective Leslie Nielsen stumbles upon an evil plan to destroy America. Contains strong language and flashing images.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Cop Leslie Nielsen is hauled out of retirement to save the Academy Awards from bombers. Anna Nicole Smith co-stars in this sequel. Discriminatory content/flashing images.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alan's brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Plague
programme.desc: A socially awkward tween endures the ruthless hierarchy at a water polo camp as his anxiety spirals into psychological turmoil over the summer. Language/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman takes a job as a housekeeper in a NYC high-rise, unaware of the building's history of disappearances.

programme.title: The Internship

programme.title: The Choral
programme.desc: A choral society's male members enlist in the First World War, leaving the demanding Dr Guthrie to recruit teenagers and experience the joy of singing.

programme.desc: After taking a mortgage company president hostage with a wired shotgun, a desperate man sparks a tense standoff that grips the nation.

programme.desc: Inspired by the 2004 Northern Bank robbery, two feuding bank employees are forced to execute Ireland's biggest heist after criminals kidnap their families.

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: A young athlete descends into a world of terror when he's invited to train with a legendary champion whose charisma curdles into something darker.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: In the last city on Earth, super assassin Charlize Theron fights to overthrow the sinister government. Futuristic action with Jonny Lee Miller. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Gator Creek
programme.desc: Vacation turns to disaster when Kyle and her friends survive a plane crash in the Louisiana Bayou, only to discover something infinitely worse lurking in the shallows.

programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List celebrates Steven Spielberg. From the brand-new Disclosure Day to Jurassic Park, these blockbuster adventures are truly tricera-top tier.

programme.title: Arcadian
programme.desc: On a decimated Earth, a father and his twin sons must fight to survive against the ferocious creatures who awaken at night. Horror thriller starring Nicolas Cage.

programme.title: WestWorld
programme.desc: Michael Crichton directs this classic sci-fi thriller about robots going rogue in a futuristic adult theme park. Yul Brynner stars alongside Richard Benjamin.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: This film has outdated attitudes, language and cultural depictions which may cause offence today. Hero Flash Gordon races to save Earth from the Emperor Ming.

programme.title: The Craft
programme.desc: Hip horror movie about four female students who band together and become witches. Starring Fairuza Balk, Robin Tunney and Neve Campbell.

programme.desc: A virus turns the residents of a small town into murderous maniacs. Horror with Timothy Olyphant. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.desc: Vin Diesel stars in this high tension action sci-fi as a murderous convict who becomes the last hope for the survivors of an intergalactic crash.

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: A widowed mother who goes to a restaurant to meet Henry, her charming date. However, her pleasant evening soon turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: Young lawyer Tom Cruise becomes embroiled in his new firm's shady dealings. Sydney Pollack directs this gripping drama. Contains strong language and violence.

programme.desc: Cunning cannibal Hannibal Lecter (Anthony Hopkins) is enlisted to help FBI agent Edward Norton catch an elusive serial killer. Strong language/violence/mature themes.

programme.desc: Despondent at losing his lover, a man (Mickey Rourke) wanders the streets of Paris and has an affair with her kinky friend (Angie Everhart).

programme.title: Breaking and Entering
programme.desc: Will (Jude Law), a landscape architect in London, is in the middle of a life crisis. His relationship with Liv (Robin Wright Penn), a depressive Scandinavian, is going nowhere. A burglary at his office leads him to Amira (Juliette Binoche), a Bosnian refugee whose husband died in Sarajevo. Will is drawn to the vulnerable woman and initiates an affair.

programme.title: What's Cooking?
programme.desc: You are invited to a tasty Thanksgiving dinner that will all at once transport you to four different worlds and take you home again. programme.title: Love and Death on Long Island
programme.desc: Curmudgeonly author Giles De'Ath (John Hurt), a widower with a marked distaste for modern popular culture, attempts to buy a ticket for a film adaptation of an E.M. Forster novel, but instead finds himself watching a tacky teen sex comedy. programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: When it comes to dating, Christina Walters (Cameron Diaz) has a golden rule: avoid searching for Mr. Right and focus on Mr. Right Now. programme.title: Burn Country
programme.desc: An exiled Afghan journalist moves to Northern California. When he tries to rise above his menial job on a police blotter by covering a local crime, he's drawn into a world of violence.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Newly hired as a producer on a national morning-news program called "Daybreak," Becky Fuller (Rachel McAdams) decides to revitalize the low-rated show by bringing in legendary anchorman Mike Pomeroy (Harrison Ford). programme.title: Demoted
programme.desc: Two prankster tire salesmen are forced to become secretaries after their long-suffering boss finally gets tired of their antics.

However, when electromagnetic pulses of lightning strike the area, the strange event turns out to be

programme.title: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: Grieving the sudden death of her parents, Anna relocates from New York to a small Florida town to live with the grandmother she's never met. programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: A cab driver realizes his current fare is a hit man that has been having him drive around from mark to mark until the last witness to a crime is dead. When the cabbie finally figures out the truth, he must prevent the assassin from wiping out his last witness without becoming the next in the professional killer's line of casualties.

programme.title: The Players Club

programme.desc: Florence and her animal friends live in the Enchanted Village, which is under the care of Zebedee, a kindly wizard. However, a dark cloud is approaching this sunny world. After being encased in ice for eons, Zeebad, the evil double of Zebedee, reappears and threatens to start another ice age. The only way to stop him is for Florence and friends to find three magic diamonds before he does.

programme.desc: An engaged couple adopts two puppies. When they decide to split up, the puppies hatch a plan to bring the two back together.

programme.desc: Three pigs raise a young wolf who questions his identity when he becomes a teen.

programme.desc: Cowgirls in high school have to run their homes while their parents are deployed.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Col. Terry Childers (Samuel L. Jackson) is a 30-year Marine veteran: a decorated officer with combat experience in Vietnam, Beirut and Desert Storm -- a patriot, a hero. But now, the country he served so well has put him on trial for a rescue mission that went terribly wrong. For his attorney, he has chosen Marine Col. Hays Hodges (Tommy Lee Jones), a comrade-in-arms who owes his life to Childers.

programme.title: The Sense of an Ending
programme.desc: A business owner (Jim Broadbent) reunites with his first love (Charlotte Rampling) after a letter and a diary force him to confront the past.

programme.title: Nebraska
programme.desc: Cantankerous old buzzard Woody Grant can barely walk down the street of his home in Billings, Mont., without stopping for a drink. So when Woody receives a sweepstakes notice in the mail and insists on making a 750-mile trip to Lincoln, Neb., to collect his prize, it falls to baffled son David to accompany him. programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Seasoned adventurer Dirk Pitt (Matthew McConaughey) sets out for the African desert with his sarcastic companion (Steve Zahn) in search of a ship rumored to have vanished long ago, the main draw being the treasure supposedly hidden within the lost vessel. programme.title: Run
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: Based upon the best-selling book "We Were Soldiers Once ... and Young" by Lt. Gen. Harold G. Moore (Ret.) and journalist Joseph L. Galloway, this compelling war drama depicts the true story of the first major battle between the United States and North Vietnamese forces. programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: In 1941, Nazi soldiers are slaughtering Eastern European Jews by the thousands. Three brothers, Tuvia (Daniel Craig), Zus (Liev Schreiber) and Asael (Jamie Bell), manage to escape and take refuge in the forest where they played in childhood. programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: Gertrude Bell's life as an explorer, cartographer, and archaeologist for the British Empire.

programme.title: The English Patient
programme.desc: The sweeping expanses of the Sahara are the setting for a passionate love affair in this adaptation of Michael Ondaatje's novel. A badly burned man, Laszlo de Almasy (Ralph Fiennes), is tended to by a nurse, Hana (Juliette Binoche), in an Italian monastery near the end of World War II. programme.title: Rebel in the Rye
programme.desc: Author J.D. Salinger leads a reclusive lifestyle after the success of his popular and controversial novel The Catcher in the Rye.

programme.title: American Assassin
programme.desc: When Cold War veteran Stan Hurley takes CIA black ops recruit Mitch Rapp under his wing, they receive an assignment to investigate a wave of random attacks on both military and civilian targets. After discovering a pattern of violence, Hurley and Rapp join forces with a lethal Turkish agent to stop a mysterious operative who wants to start a global war.

programme.title: The Silent Planet
programme.desc: Serving a life sentence alone on a distant planet, an aging convict must confront his past when a new prisoner arrives and forces him to remember his life on Earth.

programme.title: Guns Up
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
programme.desc: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius tells the simple story of a 10-year-old boy and his robot dog - battling evil, rescuing his parents, saving the Earth - and returning home in time for dinner. Jimmy's always inventing gadgets to make his life in Retroville more interesting. A boy genius with real kid emotions, Jimmy sometimes fantasizes about life on his own. programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: In an ensemble film about easy money, greed, manipulation and bad driving, a Las Vegas casino tycoon entertains his wealthiest high rollers -- a group that will bet on anything -- by pitting six ordinary people against each other in a wild dash for $2 million jammed into a locker hundreds of miles away. programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After an outlaw named Tom Chaney murders her father, feisty 14-year-old farm girl Mattie Ross hires Rooster Cogburn, a boozy, trigger-happy lawman, to help her find Chaney and avenge her father. The bickering duo are not alone in their quest, for a Texas Ranger named LaBoeuf is also tracking Chaney for reasons of his own. programme.title: Zanjeer
programme.desc: An officer after the murder of his family seeks some answers. Where he was suspended from duty, coz of false story portrayed against him by traitors.

programme.title: Chal Chala Chal
programme.desc: Deepak tries to start a transportation service after his father receives a bus upon his retirement. However, his honest endeavour is haunted by mishaps, lack of experience and corruption.

programme.title: Lootcase
programme.desc: What will you do if you find a bag full of cash? Nandan Kumar faces a similar dilemma when a bag triggers a chain of chaos in his life.

programme.title: Bhoothnath Returns
programme.desc: Bhoothnath returns from the afterlife to contest elections, fighting corruption and inspiring change. Mixing comedy, fantasy, and social satire, it delivers a heartfelt message of honesty and hope.

programme.title: Housefull 4
programme.desc: Six lovers reincarnate after 600 years, meeting again in modern times with hilarious consequences. Mixing fantasy, comedy, and romance, it's a chaotic story of love beyond lifetimes.

programme.title: Hungama
programme.desc: A web of misunderstandings brings together quirky characters in hilarious situations. Chaos, love, and laughter define this classic Priyadarshan comedy about life's funny coincidences.

programme.title: Angrezi Medium
programme.desc: Though Champak initially disapproves, he eventually does everything in his power while going through a series of hilarious mishaps to fulfil his daughter's dream of going to London to study further.
